PROJECTS WORKSHOPS MUSIC BIO RESUME EXHIBITIONS RESIDENCIES EVENTS WRITINGS

Music & Sound Art

A compilation of auditory works, sound installations, and structural software instruments designed to translate environmental data and electrical currents into auditory dynamics.

💿 Sound Releases

  • Album / Compilation Title — Record Label / Self-release (Year)

An experimental long-form album translating localized electromagnetic field noise into polyphonic audio patterns.

  • EP Project Title — Independent Digital Release (Year)

A collection of short rhythmic studies built entirely on voltage-controlled modular synthesizer modules.

🔊 Installations & Performances

  • Sound Performance Title (Commissioning Festival / Gallery Venue, Year)

A 40-minute spatialized sonic performance using quadraphonic speakers to map live ambient room acoustics.

  • Custom Software Instrument / Synthesis Patch (Open Source Release, Year)

A customized Pure Data synthesis patch developed for sonic translation of environmental data.
